text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Once again, our murder mystery<n>group has
assembled to pin down the<n>culprit once and for
all. Now, the last<n>we heard was...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So, actually, I was with Grass from<n>just after she
served dinner right up<n>until we all gathered here.
But while<n>we were together...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I caught a very brief glimpse of Sei<n>walking along
holding something...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Following Special Week's revelation,<n>Seiun Sky
seemed like the most likely<n>suspect. But in
response...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Spe's telling the truth. I waswalking around the inn holdingsomething.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Right. Last time, Sei admitted that<n>Spe's
revelation was true. Tell us,<n>Sei—do you have
some sort of scheme<n>up your sleeve?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nope, there's no scheming going on<n>here. I just
admitted the truth, that's<n>all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, it all right if I go<n>ahead and spill
my secret now? It's a<n>pretty important one,
y'know.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: An important secret? Let's hear it!<n>Vamos!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So, I happened to get a look at<n>Grass's phone.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And y'know what I saw?<n>Plant-based poison in
her purchase<n>history.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Que fuerte! Poison?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That means Grass was the one who<n>had the
poison to begin with, and she<n>spiked the meal.
But she knew<n>bringing poisoned food directly<n>
woulda been way too obvious.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Luckily for her, King just happened to<n>leave the
room, and El had dropped by<n>right before that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Grass figured she could frame El, so<n>she went
back to King's room and<n>switched the bowls...
How's that for a<n>summary of events?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué? So you're sayin' Grass is our<n>main
suspect?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? But Grass was...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. Before I forget. That sound<n>of
something breaking was King<n>dropping the bowl
after eating the<n>poison.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I happened to be nearby, so I rushed<n>over, and
that's when I found King.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I decided to run and tell<n>everyone, but I
figured it'd be<n>dangerous to leave the bowl on
the<n>floor, so I swept it up and took it with<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That must be when Spe saw me<n>booking it with
the broken bowl.<n>Nothing suspicious after all,
right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So that's what you're going with,<n>then? But you
have no proof that what<n>you're saying is the
truth, correct?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Right, no evidence. Which means it's<n>up to all of
you to make up your minds<n>one way or another.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky grins, and with two<n>suspects trying to
clear their name, a<n>timer signals the end of phase
two.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gahhh! Sei and Grass both seem<n>muy
suspechosas!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I think back over everything that's<n>been
revealed so far. Who should I<n>cast my vote for?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With the results in, Seiun Sky receives<n>the most
votes and is deemed the<n>culprit.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Darn it. Guess I couldn't pull the<n>wool over
anyone's eyes, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's right, I'm the culprit. But this<n>whole thing
was just an unfortunate<n>series of events.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, I'd actually cleaned King's<n>room during
the day, but I'd gone and<n>left my broom behind.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I waited for King to leave her room so<n>I could
sneak in and grab it, but I<n>accidentally knocked it
over.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It smashed the original bowl of<n>chawanmushi
and made a huge<n>racket, so I rushed to the
kitchen for a<n>replacement. I had no idea the food
in<n>the blue bowl had been poisoned.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Your story about my having<n>gone back to
the room to switch the<n>bowls was quite plausible
indeed.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And you timed the revelation that I<n>had been in
possession of the poison<n>quite effectively too.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But things aren't always as they<n>seem...
Ultimately, your explanation<n>wasn't consistent
with Spe's<n>statement about having been with
me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's how you knew<n>something was up...
Guess I've gotta<n>do better next time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, excellent. I would love to play<n>again.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the truth comes to light<n>and the
curtains close on the murder<n>mystery.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The results are in, but the vote is<n>divided, so
Seiun Sky is off the hook.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So the game ends without us<n>knowing who did
it? Maaan, what a<n>bummer...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I mean, that's why they call it amurder mystery. The ambiguity'spart of the suspense.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's lies were so convincing.<n>We should
definitely do this again<n>sometime.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! I didn't tell any lies!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'd very much like to deduce<n>the identity of
the real liar next time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: GASP!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is it over?! It's finally over, right?! I<n>thought I'd
never be able to breathe<n>again...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Hey, King. Welcome back to the<n>world of the
living.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Who was the real killer in the end?<n>Perhaps only
Seiun Sky and Grass<n>Wonder know the truth...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With the results in, Grass Wonder<n>receives the
most votes and is<n>deemed the culprit.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Goodness me. Well...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, you've all been<n>deceived... by
Sei's lies.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Lying, bluffing, whatever you'd like to<n>call it. But I
am not the culprit.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! Really?! I have no idea what<n>was true and
what was a lie!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, well, maybe Grass really isn't<n>the true
killer...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...But that doesn't necessarily mean<n>everything I
said was untrue. Fortune<n>favors the bold, am I
right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm not sure precisely what<n>you mean, but
you do have a way<n>with words.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha! I suppose that's<n>something we have
in common.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Who was the real killer in the end?<n>Perhaps only
Seiun Sky and Grass<n>Wonder know the truth...
